# opnsense_system_route (Resource)

Manages a static route on OPNsense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_system_route" "k8s_pods" {
  network     = "10.244.0.0/16"
  gateway     = "Null4"
  description = "Kubernetes pod network"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gateway` (String) Gateway name or UUID.
- `network` (String) Destination network in CIDR notation (e.g., `10.0.0.0/24`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this route is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.

## Import

```shell
terraform import opnsense_system_route.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
